name: Ginger-Carrot Bisque
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Chicken stock or canned broth
1 cup Half and half (light cream) [Subs. Skim Milk]
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a heavy large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add carrots and onions. Cover the saucepan and cook until the vegetables begin to soften, stirring occasionally, about 15 minutes.
3. Mix in ginger, orange peel, and coriander.
4. Add 2 cups of stock. Reduce heat to medium-low.
5. Cover the pan and simmer the soup until the carrots are very tender, about 30 minutes.
6. Puree the soup in batches in a processor or blender.
7. Add the remaining 3 cups of stock and half and half to the soup. Season with salt and pepper.
8. (Optional) Substitute skim milk and cornstarch to thicken.
9. Cook over medium heat until warm. Ladle into bowls. Sprinkle with parsley, and serve.
